records.question: Which games took place exactly in the year 2002?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT games.id FROM games
WHERE games.games_year = 2002
records.pred_sql: SELECT games.id FROM games WHERE games.games_year = 2002

records.question: Which games named exactly 1976 Summer include competitors aged at most 31?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT games.id FROM games
JOIN games_city ON games.id = games_city.games_id
JOIN games_competitor ON games.id = games_competitor.games_id
WHERE games_competitor.age <= 31 AND games.games_name = '1976 Summer'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT g.id
FROM games g
WHERE g.games_name = '1976 Summer'
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM games_city gc
    WHERE gc.games_id = g.id
)
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM games_competitor gcomp
    WHERE gcomp.games_id = g.id
    AND gcomp.age <= 31
)

records.question: Which games feature Mansour Mohamed when his height is at most 0?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT games.id FROM games
JOIN games_competitor ON games.id = games_competitor.games_id
JOIN person ON games_competitor.person_id = person.id
JOIN person_region ON person.id = person_region.person_id
WHERE person.height <= 0 AND person.full_name = 'Mansour Mohamed'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT g.id
FROM games g
INNER JOIN games_competitor gc ON g.id = gc.games_id
INNER JOIN person p ON gc.person_id = p.id
INNER JOIN person_region pr ON p.id = pr.person_id
WHERE p.height <= 0
AND p.full_name = 'Mansour Mohamed'

records.question: What Winter games named 1968 Winter took place in 1968 or earlier?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT games.id FROM games
JOIN games_city ON games.id = games_city.games_id
WHERE games.season = 'Winter' AND games.games_name = '1968 Winter' AND games.games_year <= 1968
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT g.id
FROM games g
INNER JOIN games_city gc ON g.id = gc.games_id
WHERE g.season = 'Winter'
AND g.games_name = '1968 Winter'
AND g.games_year <= 1968

records.question: Which games from the 1988 Summer season feature male competitors aged at most 21 who are no more than 167 cm tall and weigh at most 60 kg?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT games.id FROM games
JOIN games_competitor ON games.id = games_competitor.games_id
JOIN person ON games_competitor.person_id = person.id
WHERE person.height <= 167 AND games.season = 'Summer' AND games.games_name = '1988 Summer' AND person.weight <= 60 AND games_competitor.age <= 21 AND person.gender = 'M'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT g.id
FROM games g
INNER JOIN games_competitor gc ON g.id = gc.games_id
INNER JOIN person p ON gc.person_id = p.id
WHERE g.season = 'Summer'
  AND g.games_name = '1988 Summer'
  AND gc.age <= 21
  AND p.height <= 167
  AND p.weight <= 60
  AND p.gender = 'M'

records.question: Which games named 1984 Winter took place in the Winter season?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT games.id FROM games
JOIN games_city ON games.id = games_city.games_id
JOIN city ON games_city.city_id = city.id
WHERE games.season = 'Winter' AND games.games_name = '1984 Winter'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT g.id
FROM games g
INNER JOIN games_city gc ON g.id = gc.games_id
INNER JOIN city c ON gc.city_id = c.id
WHERE g.season = 'Winter' AND g.games_name = '1984 Winter'

records.question: Which games are exactly named 1988 Winter, have a Winter season, and took place in 1988 or later?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT games.id FROM games
WHERE games.games_name = '1988 Winter' AND games.season = 'Winter' AND games.games_year >= 1988
records.pred_sql:
SELECT games.id
FROM games
WHERE games.games_name = '1988 Winter'
AND games.season = 'Winter'
AND games.games_year >= 1988

records.question: What games named 1984 Winter took place in Sarajevo during the Winter season?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT games.id FROM games
JOIN games_city ON games.id = games_city.games_id
JOIN city ON games_city.city_id = city.id
WHERE games.season = 'Winter' AND city.city_name = 'Sarajevo' AND games.games_name = '1984 Winter'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT g.id
FROM games g
INNER JOIN games_city gc ON g.id = gc.games_id
INNER JOIN city c ON gc.city_id = c.id
WHERE g.season = 'Winter'
  AND g.games_name = '1984 Winter'
  AND c.city_name = 'Sarajevo'

records.question: What games named 1988 Summer took place in the Summer season and included competitors who were exactly 32 years old?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT games.id FROM games
JOIN games_city ON games.id = games_city.games_id
JOIN games_competitor ON games.id = games_competitor.games_id
WHERE games_competitor.age = 32 AND games.season = 'Summer' AND games.games_name = '1988 Summer'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT g.id
FROM games g
WHERE g.season = 'Summer'
  AND g.games_name = '1988 Summer'
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM games_city gc
    WHERE gc.games_id = g.id
  )
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM games_competitor gcomp
    WHERE gcomp.games_id = g.id
      AND gcomp.age = 32
  )

records.question: What games took place in cities up to and including the year 1932?

WHERE games.games_year <= 1932
